name: Meet the winners of Solana IGNITION
snippet: Meet the winners of Solana IGNITION Solana Ventures is pleased to announce the results of IGNITION, a global hackathon focused on Web3, DeFi, Gaming, and Digital Art & Collectable NFTs. IGNITION is the fourth Solana hackathon, and the third and final one to take place this year.
